violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the basins of the 3 bay sink and walls near shake machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2025
